title: The Magician
author: Sol Stein
description: This is a tale of two magicians, of high school extortion and violence, and of a criminal trial in which the guilty go free. Selected by the Book-of-the-Month Club, The Magician has sold over one million copies. Webster Schott wrote in the New York Times Book Review, “I cannot recall a novel of this type with greater pleasure. Beautiful and gripping.”
